properties.name: liminallabs.gateway.auth.keycloak.base-url-internal
properties.description: Keycloak internal URI, used to exchange code for access_token

properties.name: liminallabs.gateway.auth.keycloak.base-url
properties.description: Keycloak public URI, used to redirect user to login

properties.name: liminallabs.gateway.cookie-max-age
properties.description: Session cookie max age, defaults to 3600

properties.name: liminallabs.gateway.cookie-secure
properties.description: Session cookie secure property, defaults to 'true'

properties.name: liminallabs.gateway.cookie-same-site
properties.description: Session cookie Same-Site property, defaults to 'Strict'

properties.name: liminallabs.gateway.cookie-domain
properties.description: Session cookie Domain property, defaults to 'localhost'

properties.name: liminallabs.gateway.frontend-url
properties.description: Frontend redirect URI after sucessfull login and code exchange
